title: Trail Making Lab
description: An interactive diagnostic neuropsychological assessment suite based on the standardized Trail Making Test protocols used to evaluate executive function, cognitive processing speed, and cognitive flexibility. The application dynamically structures a responsive, randomized coordinate sandbox populated with vector target nodes mapping both Part A linear numeric progressions (1-2-3...) and Part B alternating cognitive sets (1-A-2-B...). It tracks real-time path drawing overlays, computing microsecond reaction deltas and incursion collision errors with data backup cached via local browser features.
